summary: Board-specific 8-LED latch helper for the CT117E-M4 platform, using fixed data pins PC8-PC15 and a latch-enable control pin.
notes: This module targets the on-board SN74HC573 LED bank on CT117E-M4.
The LED data bus is fixed to PC8-PC15 and shares the LCD high-byte data bus on the official board.
The planner only allocates the latch signal because the board wiring fixes the data bus.
